name: RT Minerals Corp
summary: RT Minerals Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada. It also explores for gold and base metals. The company owns a 100% interests in the Norwalk Gold Property comprising three unpatented mineral claims consisting of 29 units with a total area of 445 hectares located in Wawa, Ontario. It also holds an option to acquire 100% interest in the Link-Catharine RLDZ gold property comprising 15 unpatented single cell mining claims with a total area of 220 hectares in one claim block located in the Town of Kirkland Lake, Ontario. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
